headline: Devon Energy (DVN) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Clay Gaspar: Today, we will focus on Devon Energy Corporation's strong first quarter 2026 results, which once again demonstrate the operational excellence and financial discipline that define this organization.  After walking through our Q1 results, I will turn to a quick update on our transformative merger with Cotera Energy.  As you can see on the slide, beating on production and capital once again resulted in impressive free cash flow for the quarter.

headline: Devon Energy's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Coterra Merger on Course
summary: DVN tops Q1 EPS estimates despite a revenue miss, as production rises and the Coterra merger nears a close.

headline: Devon Misses Q1 Profit Estimates Ahead of Coterra Merger
summary: Devon reported lower-than-expected first-quarter earnings despite strong oil production and free cash flow generation as the shale producer prepares to close its merger with Coterra Energy.
